en.title: Programming Language Popularity
en.sourceNote: Based on the TIOBE Index (measures language 'popularity' via search volume across 20+ engines incl. Google, Bing, Wikipedia - not technical merit) · July 2026

ko.title: 월드컵 최다 우승국
ko.sourceNote: FIFA 공식 자료 기준(우승 횟수 내림차순 정렬, 동률은 국가명 가나다순) · 2026년 7월(2026 대회 결과 반영)

items.name: 스페인
items.description: 2회 우승 (2010, 2026) · 2026년 결승에서 아르헨티나를 꺾고 두 번째 우승 달성

en.title: Countries With the Most World Cup Wins
en.sourceNote: Based on official FIFA records (sorted by title count descending, ties broken alphabetically) · July 2026 (reflects the 2026 tournament result)

items.name: Brazil
items.description: 5 titles (1958, 1962, 1970, 1994, 2002) - the all-time most World Cup wins

items.name: Spain
items.description: 2 titles (2010, 2026) - won their second title in the 2026 final against Argentina

items.name: Uruguay
items.description: 2 titles (1930, 1950) - winners of the inaugural 1930 World Cup
